creator: torfinn.ingolfsen@broadpark.no
text:
This problem exists in any version of tiff newer than 3.8.0.Currently, the newest version of tiff in ports is 3.8.2_1

When using tiff2pdf to convert a tiff image into a pdf file, the resulting image gets a wrong color tint. I used the
following command: tiff2pdf -p a4 -n -j -q 75 -o filename.pdf filename.tiff

More info, as well as test images can be found at this page:
http://tingox.googlepages.com/libtiff_freebsd

The source images got converted to jpeg on upload, they can be provided on request. Or I will find another place to host them.

Fix: 

None know by submitter at this time.
Workaround: portdowngrade to tiff 3.8.0
How-To-Repeat: 

1. Install any version of tiff newer than 3.8.0
2. Use tiff2pdf and convert a tiff image to pdf.
